config.script:
'tablica do zapamiętania wybranych pozycji dim pTabCheckCopy : set pTabCheckCopy = doc_.afc.new_navoarray()
'typ dokumentu rozchodowego dim nTypDok: nTypDok = N5REJESTRDOK__WZ
'----------------------------------- '----- otwórz/zamknij stronę ----- '----------------------------------- function fopen() fopen=true end function
function fback() page_.result = vbCancel page_.goback() fback = true end function
'------------------------------------------ '----- ustawia tytul strony raportu ----- '------------------------------------------ sub page_title() dim pTitle set pTitle = page_.ctrl(ID_TITLE) pTitle.text = "" pTitle.fontsize = 5 page_.topelement.title = "Wybór pozycji dla dokumentu rozchodowego" end sub
'---------------------------------------------------- '----- dodaje odpowiednie przyciski na strone ----- '---------------------------------------------------- sub page_buttons dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_TAB_BUTTONS)).removeall tab.newrow page_add_button tab, "OK", vbOK page_add_button tab, "Anuluj", vbCancel end sub
sub page_add_button(byref tab, byval strName, byval nOption) dim pNewHli set pNewHli = doc_.createhli() pNewHli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "page_click" pNewHli.prop(GVAR_MODALRES) = CLng(nOption)
tab.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 tab.cell.keepline = true tab.cell.align = ALIGN_CENTER set tab.element.hli = pNewHli with tab.element .text = strName .size = 12 .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON end with end sub
'------------------------------------ '----- naciśnięcie na klawisz ----- '------------------------------------ sub page_click(byref pHli) page_.result=pHli.prop(GVAR_MODALRES) page_.goback end sub
'--------------------------------- '----- buduj potwierdzenie ----- '--------------------------------- function buildPotw(byref pTabProdukt, byref pTabOpak, byref pTabIlosc, byref pTabCheck, byref nDokType) 'nagłówek potwierdzenia page_title
'ustaw domyślnie zaznaczone dim iter for iter = 0 to pTabCheck.upperIndex pTabCheckCopy.add pTabCheck.value(iter) next
'buduj raport page_pozycje pTabProdukt, pTabOpak, pTabIlosc, pTabCheck
'przyciski page_buttons
buildPotw = page_.domodalauto()
'gdy potwierdzenie wykonania OK => modyfikuj oryginalne tablice if buildPotw = 1 then set pTabCheck = pTabCheckCopy nDokType = nTypDok end if
end function
'---------------------------- '----- wypisz pozycje ----- '---------------------------- sub page_pozycje(byref pTabProdukt, byref pTabOpak, byref pTabIlosc, byref pTabCheck) dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_TAB_POS)).removeall
tab.newrow tab.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER tab.newcell tab.cell.rowspan = 2 tab.newcell.addtext "Lp" tab.cell.rowspan = 2 tab.cell.width = clng(600) tab.newcell.addtext "Produkt" tab.cell.rowspan = 1 tab.cell.colspan = 2 tab.cell.align = ALIGN_CENTER tab.newcell.addtext "Ilość" tab.cell.width = CLng(3000) tab.cell.rowspan = 2 tab.newrow tab.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER tab.newcell.addtext "Nazwa" tab.cell.width = CLng(7000) tab.cell.rowspan = 1 tab.newcell.addtext "Indeks" tab.cell.width = CLng(3000) tab.cell.rowspan = 1
'wypisz pozycje dim iter, pCheckBox for iter = 0 to pTabProdukt.upperIndex tab.newrow if (iter + 1) mod 2 = 0 then tab.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN end if
'checkbox tab.newcell tab.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX,-1 set pCheckBox = tab.element with pCheckBox .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") .border = 0 end with tab.element.addnew CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1 pCheckBox.value = "1" set tab.row.userprop = doc_.createhli() tab.row.userprop.prop(PROP_LP) = CLng(iter)
'lp tab.newcell.addtext cstr(iter + 1) tab.element.fontsize = 3 tab.element.fontname = "Verdana" tab.element.forecolor = RGB(0,0,0)
tab.newcell.addtext " " + pTabProdukt.value(iter).strNazwa tab.element.fontsize = 3 tab.element.fontname = "Verdana" tab.element.forecolor = RGB(0,0,0)
tab.newcell.addtext " " + pTabProdukt.value(iter).strIndeks tab.element.fontsize = 3 tab.element.fontname = "Verdana" tab.element.forecolor = RGB(0,0,0)
tab.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(pTabIlosc.value(iter),pTabOpak.value(iter).pJednOpak.strSkrot,pTabOpak.value(iter).pJednOpak.nDokladnosc - 1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT tab.element.fontsize = 3 tab.element.fontname = "Verdana" tab.element.forecolor = RGB(0,0,0) next end sub
'------------------------------------ '----- kontrolki dla checkbox ----- '------------------------------------ function c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ondataentered = true dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_LP) then pTabCheckCopy.value(oRow.userprop(PROP_LP)) = newValue end if end if end function
function c##CTRLID_DOK_TYPE##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_DOK_TYPE##_ongetdata = true select case nTypDok case N5REJESTRDOK__WZ oCtrl.value = clng(1) case N5REJESTRDOK__RW oCtrl.value = clng(2) case N5REJESTRDOK_REZERWACJE oCtrl.value = clng(3) end select end function
function c##CTRLID_DOK_TYPE##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) : c##CTRLID_DOK_TYPE##_ondataentered = true select case newValue case clng(1) nTypDok = N5REJESTRDOK__WZ case clng(2) nTypDok = N5REJESTRDOK__RW case clng(3) nTypDok = N5REJESTRDOK_REZERWACJE end select end function
